title: Fix session creation failure error

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the bug causing session creation to fail with the error 'Failed to create a session'. Trace the full session creation flow from the CreateSession page through the backend createSession call. Ensure that submitting a valid court count successfully creates and persists the session in the backend, stores the session info in local storage, returns a valid session code, and navigates the host to the HostSessionDashboard without error. Handle both authenticated and guest (anonymous) actor cases.

quotes: Error Failed to create a session

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the session creation form with a valid court count (1–10) does not display 'Failed to create a session'.
A session is successfully created in the backend and a unique alphanumeric session code is returned.
The session code and session metadata are persisted to local storage after successful creation.
The host is navigated to the HostSessionDashboard after successful session creation.
The fix works for both Internet Identity authenticated users and guest (anonymous) users.
Any backend Motoko errors or frontend actor invocation errors are properly caught and surfaced with a meaningful message rather than a silent failure.

constraints: Do not change the session data model or existing session fields unless required to fix the bug.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing session creation UI layout or design.
Fixing unrelated bugs outside the session creation flow.
